capacity_scope_description: Nameplate capacity of 400,000 kW (400 MW) for the installation size tier.
Installation size tier corresponding to a capacity of 1000 kW, representing a standard or medium-scale deployment for the technology category.

Capacity tier for installations with a nameplate capacity of 100,000 kW (100 MW) or similar, typically applicable to large-scale industrial or utility-scale systems. Classification follows the nomenclature's capacity normalisation convention (kW-based, EU/Switzerland context).
